data.title: 国际服新专辑「Kokoro Gradation」英文版发布
data.summary: Sensei, have you been enjoying “Kokoro Gradation”? This time, the English version—once again featuri
data.body:
Sensei, have you been enjoying “Kokoro Gradation”?
This time, the English version—once again featuring 
@raon_leee
—has been released!

➡️ Kokoro Gradation EN: https://youtu.be/ZrlBHoXeLIY
